items.title: Private Markets: Musk’s SpaceX targets 2026 IPO at valuation of $1.5T
items.description: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is moving ahead with plans for an initial public offering that would seek to raise “significantly more” than $30B at a market value of about $1.5T. Meanwhile, Agentic engineering startup Port raised $100M in a Series C funding round at $800M valuation.
